title: Good: delta-sync falls back to full reload on has_more_changes
description: chat_delta_sync() in client_task.rs correctly checks changes.has_more_changes and falls back to load_chats() (full query+get) rather than applying a partial diff. This prevents a silent chat list desync when the server can't enumerate all changes. The fallback also updates chat_state to the new authoritative state from the full reload, so subsequent delta syncs work from a clean baseline. Worth keeping: it would be easy to omit the has_more_changes check and only discover the bug when a server prunes its change log under load.
